scripts.start:services: concurrently "cd services/user-service && npm start" "cd services/driver-service && npm start" "cd services/booking-service && npm start" "cd services/pricing-service && npm start" "cd services/pooling-service && npm start" "cd services/payment-service && npm start" "cd services/analytics-service && npm start" "cd services/notification-service && npm start" "cd services/route-service && npm start" "cd services/audit-service && npm start"
scripts.install:all: cd gateway && npm install && cd ../services && cd user-service && npm install && cd .. && cd driver-service && npm install && cd .. && cd booking-service && npm install && cd .. && cd pricing-service && npm install && cd .. && cd pooling-service && npm install && cd .. && cd payment-service && npm install && cd .. && cd analytics-service && npm install && cd .. && cd notification-service && npm install && cd .. && cd route-service && npm install && cd .. && cd audit-service && npm install && cd ..
